# Cakes by Steph

> Bespoke custom cake atelier in Leesburg, Virginia: wedding cakes, quinceañera cakes, birthday & celebration cakes, baby & baptism cakes, business & event cakes, and authentic Peruvian pastries. Rated 5.0 across 47 reviews, made from scratch by Stephanie.

Stephanie personally designs, bakes, and delivers every commission. No apprentices, no mixes, 100% from scratch with real butter, farm-fresh eggs, Madagascar vanilla, and Valrhona chocolate, trained under a Peruvian pastry master. Hand-delivered across Leesburg, Ashburn, Sterling, Herndon, Reston, Chantilly, Fairfax, Vienna, McLean, Loudoun County, and the wider Northern Virginia area. Phone (240) 471-5637. Instagram @_cakes_bysteph_llc. A full Spanish version of the site is available under /es/.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://cakesbystephva.com/): services overview, reviews, and how ordering works
- [Request a quote](https://cakesbystephva.com/custom-order): main inquiry form (event date, guest count, vision); Stephanie replies within 24 hours
- [Portfolio](https://cakesbystephva.com/portfolio): recent cake work, filterable by category
- [Wedding cakes](https://cakesbystephva.com/wedding-cakes): wedding cake service, tastings, and delivery
- [Quinceañera cakes](https://cakesbystephva.com/quinceanera-cakes): showpiece quinceañera cakes
- [Birthday & celebration cakes](https://cakesbystephva.com/birthday-cakes): birthdays, showers, and milestones
- [Baby & baptism cakes](https://cakesbystephva.com/baby-baptism-cakes): baby showers, christenings, baptisms
- [Peruvian pastries](https://cakesbystephva.com/peruvian-pastries): alfajores, cachitos, piononitos, milhojitas, empanaditas, enrolladitos, triples
- [Business & event orders](https://cakesbystephva.com/corporate-cakes): one-time branded and corporate event cakes
- [Wholesale & recurring orders](https://cakesbystephva.com/commercial): restaurants, cafes, and scheduled dessert supply
- [About Stephanie](https://cakesbystephva.com/about): founder story and training
- [Areas served](https://cakesbystephva.com/areas): Northern Virginia delivery area
- [Contact](https://cakesbystephva.com/contact): phone, email, and message form
- [For planners & venues](https://cakesbystephva.com/partners): trade and partner inquiries

## Pricing & policies

- Private tasting is $55, credited toward your order
- Custom cakes start around $195
- A 50% deposit holds your date; final payment is due about one week before
- Weekend dates typically book 4 to 6 weeks out; monthly commissions are limited to protect quality
- Every cake gets a custom design mockup before baking begins
